contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 40
- Description: White-label: label-orientation fix, mockup rebuild, and implementation committed to git
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/182
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/663
  
  Details:
  Gary spotted the mockup did not match the product photo. Confirmed by measurement: the label on the actual product is 267x520px = aspect 1:1.95 = 2.05in W x 4in H PORTRAIT, while the page asserts 4in W x 2in H landscape (1200x600) everywhere. The spec is rotated 90 degrees from the physical product, so every design collected under it is unusable.
  
  Likely origin traced: WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md:131 cites a real ledger purchase, 'Sticker Mule 4x2in custom rectangle label (order R384751187)' - almost certainly the QR-code label stock, not the chocolate-bar label. Also found the canonical AGROVERSE_WHITE_LABEL_SUPPLY_CHAIN.md referenced by the shop handoff does not exist anywhere, which is why the repo cannot settle the question.
  
  Delivered:
  - Rebuilt white-label-mockup.png from the real product photo: portrait 2x4 placeholder composited onto the actual kraft pouch at the real label bbox, replacing an abstract landscape diagram containing no product.
  - Auth card now shows that single mockup (was: duplicate packaging shot + diagram); object-fit contain so the label is never cropped; mockup stacks above the email field on narrow viewports (proof before ask).
  - Committed the white-label implementation to git - it had been living entirely untracked despite the plan claiming 'deployed to production'. Includes the 4 dependency files (products.js SKU, shared-chrome.js nav/footer, index.html CTAs, checkout.gs design_url/design_id).
  - Plan updated with D0 (9-row flip checklist), PR0 marked done, RESUME pointer moved to D0 gated on Gary, and a START HERE handoff block for the next agent.
  
  Merged: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/182 and https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/663
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 66.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
